hooks.command: RPATH=""; [ -f ROADMAP.md ] && RPATH=ROADMAP.md; [ -f docs/ROADMAP.md ] && RPATH=docs/ROADMAP.md; [ -n "$RPATH" ] && echo "=== NexusRhythm Status ===" && grep -E 'Current_Phase|Phase_Status|Active_Mode|Pending_Debt' "$RPATH" | head -10; exit 0

RPATH=""; [ -f ROADMAP.md ] && RPATH=ROADMAP.md; [ -f docs/ROADMAP.md ] && RPATH=docs/ROADMAP.md; if [ -n "$RPATH" ] && grep -q 'Pending_Debt: true' "$RPATH"; then if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git commit|git push'; then echo '🚫 BLOCKED: Pending_Debt is true. Clear debt first.' && exit 1; fi; fi; exit 0
